subcodes.first_line: O My servant! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, for verily I am the Wronged One, the Lone One. Remember thou the days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا خادمی ان استمع ندائی من شطر سجنی باننی انا المظلوم الفرید ان اذکر ایام
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
